headline: AutoZone Vendor Summit Recognizes Contributions of Top Suppliers
summary: MEMPHIS, Tenn., June 03, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- AutoZone (NYSE: AZO) recognized 15 of its top suppliers at its annual Vendor Summit. The awards celebrate companies that achieved exceptional results while maintaining a strong focus on customer satisfaction over the past year. AutoZone awarded Sylvania the 2026 Vendor of the Year, the company's highest vendor honor. Sylvania delivers an exceptional partnership through long-term investment, cost reductions, innovation and supply chain excellence,
